questions.q: What was the official ruling regarding the death of a refugee left at a Buffalo doughnut shop by Border Patrol?
questions.correctText: The death was ruled a homicide.

questions.q: What significant development occurred regarding the DHS funding bill on April 1, 2026?
options: Speaker Mike Johnson caved to Democrats' demands
questions.correctText: House Speaker Mike Johnson caved to Democrats' demands on the DHS funding bill.

questions.q: Which high-profile figure abruptly left Supreme Court arguments concerning birthright citizenship on April 1, 2026?
questions.correctText: Donald Trump attended the Supreme Court arguments regarding birthright citizenship and left during the opposing party's arguments.

questions.q: What legislative action did the governors of Florida and Mississippi take on April 1, 2026?
options: Approved bills to increase teacher salaries
questions.correctText: The governors of Florida and Mississippi signed proof-of-citizenship voting bills.

questions.q: According to reports from late March 2026, what information related to a 13-year-old accuser of Donald Trump has the Justice Department reportedly kept secret?
options: Dozens of Jeffrey Epstein files linked to her allegations
questions.correctText: The Justice Department has not released dozens of Jeffrey Epstein files linked to allegations from a 13-year-old accuser against Donald Trump.
